ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade transaction */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the transaction */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" INTEGER /* Type of the transaction (e.g., export, import) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country involved in the transaction */,
  "hs_code" INTEGER /* HS Code (Harmonized System Code) of the commodity */,
  "statistic_code" INTEGER /* Statistic Code for the commodity */,
  "unit_code" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "quantity_jul_2020" REAL /* Quantity of the commodity traded in July 2020 */,
  "fob_baht_jul_2020" REAL /* FOB value (in Thai Baht) of the commodity traded in July 2020 */,
  "quantity_jan_jul_2020" REAL /* Quantity of the commodity traded from January to July 2020 */,
  "fob_baht_jan_jul_2020" REAL /* FOB value (in Thai Baht) of the commodity traded from January to July 2020 */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Mode of transport used for the transaction */,
  "port_of_entry" TEXT /* Port of entry for the transaction */,
  "customs_procedure_code" INTEGER /* Customs procedure code for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, cleared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_unit_code FOREIGN KEY ("unit_code") REFERENCES unit_codes ("unit_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_hs_code FOREIGN KEY ("hs_code") REFERENCES hs_codes ("hs_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_statistic_code FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_code") REFERENCES statistic_codes ("statistic_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the country's trade office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the country's trade office */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the country's trade office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hs_codes" (
  "hs_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HS Code */,
  "hs_code" INTEGER /* HS Code for the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HS Code */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the commodity */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the commodity (e.g., agricultural, manufactured) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the HS Code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hs_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistic_codes" (
  "statistic_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Statistic Code */,
  "statistic_code" INTEGER /* Statistic Code for the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Statistic Code */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_codes" (
  "unit_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Unit Code */,
  "unit_code" TEXT /* Unit Code for the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Unit Code */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate for the unit (e.g., 1 TON = 1000 KGM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., export, import) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction type (e.g., trade, non-trade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, policymaker, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trade data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, print) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES trade_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_trade_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly trade report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country involved in the report */,
  "hs_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HS Code of the commodity */,
  "statistic_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Statistic Code of the commodity */,
  "unit_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Unit Code of the commodity */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Total quantity of the commodity traded in the month */,
  "fob_baht" REAL /* Total FOB value (in Thai Baht) of the commodity traded in the month */,
  "previous_year_quantity" REAL /* Total quantity of the commodity traded in the same month of the previous year */,
  "previous_year_fob_baht" REAL /* Total FOB value (in Thai Baht) of the commodity traded in the same month of the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_trade_reports_hs_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("hs_code_id") REFERENCES hs_codes ("hs_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_trade_reports_statistic_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_code_id") REFERENCES statistic_codes ("statistic_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_trade_reports_unit_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_code_id") REFERENCES unit_codes ("unit_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_trade_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarterly_trade_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarterly trade analysis */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analysis */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the analysis */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country involved in the analysis */,
  "hs_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HS Code of the commodity */,
  "statistic_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Statistic Code of the commodity */,
  "unit_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Unit Code of the commodity */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Total quantity of the commodity traded in the quarter */,
  "fob_baht" REAL /* Total FOB value (in Thai Baht) of the commodity traded in the quarter */,
  "trend_analysis" TEXT /* Trend analysis of the commodity trade in the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_trade_analyses_statistic_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_code_id") REFERENCES statistic_codes ("statistic_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_trade_analyses_unit_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_code_id") REFERENCES unit_codes ("unit_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_trade_analyses_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_trade_analyses_hs_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("hs_code_id") REFERENCES hs_codes ("hs_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_trade_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annual trade summary */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the summary */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country involved in the summary */,
  "hs_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HS Code of the commodity */,
  "statistic_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Statistic Code of the commodity */,
  "unit_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Unit Code of the commodity */,
  "total_quantity" REAL /* Total quantity of the commodity traded in the year */,
  "total_fob_baht" REAL /* Total FOB value (in Thai Baht) of the commodity traded in the year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the commodity trade in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_trade_summaries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_trade_summaries_statistic_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_code_id") REFERENCES statistic_codes ("statistic_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_trade_summaries_hs_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("hs_code_id") REFERENCES hs_codes ("hs_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_trade_summaries_unit_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_code_id") REFERENCES unit_codes ("unit_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "hs_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HS Code being translated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the translation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Translated description of the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_hs_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("hs_code_id") REFERENCES hs_codes ("hs_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customs_offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customs office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the customs office */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customs office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customs office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customs office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade agreement */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country involved in the agreement */,
  "partner_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the partner country involved in the agreement */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade agreement */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the trade agreement */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the trade agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_agreements_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_agreements_partner_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
